title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, January 31 2023
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 31/01/2023
Image reference: 2023-01-31_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-january-31-2023_img1.png
Bulkers : Bulker values have remained stable. Capesize Aliki (180,200 DWT, Mar 2005, Imabari) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 15.08 mil, VV Value USD 15.77 mil - DD Due. Supramax Bulk Newport (52,600 DWT, Mar 2003, Kanasashi) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 9.30 mil, VV Value USD 10.52 mil - SS/DD Due.
